answers.question: What should the default logged-in dashboard home be: the linked-project home or the old idea-board-first home?
answers.chosen_path: Use the linked-project home as the default logged-in dashboard, and move broader idea browsing into Pensieve.
answers.consequences: The home experience stays calm and focused on linked projects with one-click access to active work, while idea discovery becomes less prominent on the home screen but the full idea library remains available via Pensieve.

rows.recommended_next_action: Implement the linked-project home shell as the default logged-in dashboard and add lower-right Pensieve access, then verify active work is reachable in one click and the full idea library remains accessible.

answers.objective: Measure whether kernel task artifacts improve handoff pickup quality over free-form and generic checklist alternatives.

claims.claim: On the matched live continuation simulation, kernel artifacts support a downstream continuation score that meets or exceeds generic checklist artifacts without a higher invention rate.
